'''''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' Cine-Manga''' is the third of the Cine-Manga series, published by [[Tokyopop]] in Europe in [[2005]] and later republished in the US by [[Dark Horse Comics]] in [[2008]].

{{Comics-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''High above the forest moon of Endor, the Empire is building another Death Star. If the Rebel Alliance hopes to bring its vision of peace to the galaxy, Emperor Palpatine and his unflinching enforcer Darth Vader must be stopped!''

''Experience the climax of one of the most beloved sagas in history as Luke Skywalker, Princess Leia, Han Solo, and all the rest reach their ultimate destinies in this photo comic that fits perfectly into your pocket!''

*This manga-sized volume adapts Star Wars: Return of the Jedi into a comic made up entirely of images from the film!
